title: COLLATE operator masked by function calls
key_bug_features: COLLATE operator masked by upper() function calls
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT COLLATE nocase, value INTEGER);
SELECT 'abc' == (name || '') COLLATE nocase FROM test_table WHERE value = 1;
SELECT 'abc' == (name || upper('' COLLATE nocase)) FROM test_table WHERE value = 2;
